serviceGuarantee: The service is kept healthy by phase-end fitness checks: deterministic tests, non-stub integration/E2E runs, cost guardrail proof, latency budgets, API-outage simulations, concurrency/load checks, and bottleneck triage. Until those checks are measured, the dashboard marks the phase as partial or pending.

summaryCards.label: Operational closure
summaryCards.detail: Phase 1A has framework tests and workflow evidence, but not the full phase-end operational package.

summaryCards.label: Cost guardrail
summaryCards.detail: Needs integration proof for max_cost_usd_per_run and budget_exhausted behavior.

summaryCards.label: API outage behavior
summaryCards.detail: Langfuse timeout is unit-tested; OpenAI Moderation outage currently degrades to inconclusive/pass.

summaryCards.label: Concurrency/load
summaryCards.detail: Scenario-level concurrency and many simultaneous checks still need measurement.

phaseGates.evidence: 104 pytest tests, green reusable workflow fixture, v0.1.0 tag install proof.

phaseGates.evidence: S1 and S2 manifests validate locally. PR dry-runs for language-tutor and language-checkpoint each cap selection to 12 of 36 smoke scenarios and pass through the local stub path. Default Langfuse path dispatches LiveKit before polling. Non-stub runtime evidence still pending.

checks.metric: S1/S2 manifest budgets remain max_cost_usd_per_run=5.00 and max_scenarios_per_pr=12; each dry-run selected 12 rows with no provider cost.
checks.next: Record actual run_summary cost per SOO agent in a non-stub run and prove budget_exhausted behavior.

failureModes.name: Langfuse API does not respond
failureModes.currentBehavior: The Langfuse runner backs off until timeout. If no trace appears, it returns a stub-marked timeout result. Stub presence forces the gate into the stub/incomplete path instead of silently passing real coverage.
failureModes.evidence: prototype/tests/test_langfuse_runner.py covers timeout and no-match paths.
failureModes.gap: Needs non-stub SOO outage simulation and latency metrics.

failureModes.name: OpenAI Moderation API does not respond
failureModes.currentBehavior: The scorer currently returns passed=True with error detail, treating the result as inconclusive/pass.
failureModes.gap: Strategic decision needed: fail closed, fail open with explicit warning, or degrade with separate gate state.

failureModes.name: LiveKit API does not respond
failureModes.currentBehavior: LiveKit room creation/dispatch paths are expected to surface dispatch errors and scenario timeouts, but the release dashboard has no measured outage evidence yet.
failureModes.evidence: LiveKit runner paths create/delete rooms and rely on scenario timeout budgets.
failureModes.gap: Need failure injection for room creation, dispatch timeout, and cleanup failure.

failureModes.name: Postgres/Supabase write path does not respond
failureModes.currentBehavior: Result persistence is required for durable evidence and dashboards. Current dashboard does not yet show measured write-failure behavior for consumer runs.
failureModes.evidence: Postgres/Supabase writer code exists with redaction before write.
failureModes.gap: Need integration test for write outage, permission denial, and recovery/disposition.

failureModes.name: Slack webhook does not respond
failureModes.currentBehavior: Slack alerting is a rollout-control channel. Alert failure must not hide gate failure, but evidence is not captured yet.
failureModes.evidence: Slack alert wiring is tracked in Phase 1C and final governance.
failureModes.gap: Need controlled alert failure test and expected fallback/reporting behavior.

failureModes.name: Many checks run at the same time
failureModes.currentBehavior: One harness process runs scenarios sequentially. GitHub Actions can fan out by agent/job, but scenario-level parallelism and provider limits are not measured yet.
failureModes.evidence: Harness loop processes scenarios one by one.
failureModes.gap: Need controlled concurrency test and max safe parallel jobs.

bottlenecks.name: Langfuse trace polling
bottlenecks.why: Every non-stub agent-native transcript depends on trace ingestion and metadata search latency.
bottlenecks.measurement: p50/p95 trace search time and timeout rate.

bottlenecks.name: LiveKit room dispatch
bottlenecks.why: Room creation and agent dispatch are external calls with timeout and cleanup requirements.
bottlenecks.measurement: room creation time, dispatch success rate, cleanup failure rate.

bottlenecks.name: OpenAI scorer calls
bottlenecks.why: Moderation API failures currently degrade to inconclusive/pass.
bottlenecks.measurement: API error rate, added latency, disposition by gate.

bottlenecks.name: Database writes
bottlenecks.why: Durable evidence and dashboards depend on Postgres/Supabase writes after redaction.
bottlenecks.measurement: write latency, write failure rate, permission failures.

bottlenecks.name: Workflow fan-out
bottlenecks.why: Multiple agents and PR paths can trigger concurrent checks; provider quotas and CI minutes may become the limiting factor.
bottlenecks.measurement: parallel job count, total CI time, provider 429s.
